00039 package java.lang.ref;
00040 
00073 public abstract class Reference
00074 {
00075     // Note that this class' layout is handled internally by the Jelatine VM
00076     // For example the 'referent' field won't be put amidst the references of
00077     // the objects even though it is a reference
00078 
00083     private Object referent;
00084 
00091     Reference(Object ref)
00092     {
00093         referent = ref;
00094     }
00095 
00102     public void clear()
00103     {
00104         referent = null;
00105     }
00106 
00112     public Object get()
00113     {
00114         return referent;
00115     }
00116 }
